stemHtml: What is the influence of increasing aeroplane mass on M<sub>CRIT</sub> at constant IAS? (n = 1)

options.a: M<sub>CRIT</sub> increases as a result of compressibility effects.
options.b: M<sub>CRIT</sub> decreases as a result of flying at a smaller angle of attack.
options.c: M<sub>CRIT</sub> decreases as a result of flying at a larger angle of attack.
options.d: M<sub>CRIT</sub> increases as a result of flying at a larger angle of attack.
